title: cestrum terminale
intro: Cestrum terminale, also known as the Night-Blooming Jessamine or Devil's Breath, is a flowering plant native to South America and the Caribbean. This plant contains the alkaloid compound cesiopelletierine, which is responsible for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood pressure and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cestrum terminale include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and premenstrual syndrome. Cestrum terminale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
